title: RevocationTimingMode
description: Check-timing behavior for revocation during credential verification. Used in RevocationProfile.check_mode. Distinct from RevocationCheckMode (revocation-check-modes.json) which governs failure behavior in TrustProfile.

ALWAYS.description: Live revocation check required on every verification. No caching permitted.

CACHED.description: Accept cached revocation result within cache_ttl_seconds. A live check is performed when the cache entry expires.

OFFLINE_GRACE.description: Accept last known revocation status within offline_grace_seconds. Used for offline/proximity scenarios.

DISABLED.description: Revocation not configured for this profile. No revocation check is performed. MUST NOT be used for credentials with compliance_code ICAO_DTC, AAMVA_MDL, or EUDI_PID. Distinct from RevocationCheckMode.SKIP (revocation-check-modes.json) which governs failure behavior during a check — DISABLED means no check is attempted.
